samples.text: All flowers are plants. A rose is a flower. Therefore, is a rose a plant?
Every flower belongs to the category of plants. A rose is classified as a flower. Does this mean a rose is a plant?
All blossoms are plants. A garden rose is a blossom. Therefore, is a garden rose a plant?
A rose belongs to the group of flowers. The group of flowers falls under plants. Based on this, is a rose a plant?
All flowers are plants. A rose is a flower. The report is due on Friday. Therefore, is a rose a plant?
